sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Year 93 on Mars. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. Morale is hopeful. We have 144 food units left.
Population: 26. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Orion-12.
Another year. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Iris (year 93): 'Today I realized: the output of Year 93 is the input to Year 94. We are being data-sloshed.'
